LanguageData.Diary_AnomalyPolicy.label: Anomaly narrative policy
LanguageData.Diary_AnomalyPolicy.monolithStirringNarr: the monolith visibly reached its Stirring chapter
LanguageData.Diary_AnomalyPolicy.monolithWakingNarrat: the monolith visibly reached its Waking chapter
LanguageData.Diary_AnomalyPolicy.monolithVoidAwakened: the monolith visibly reached the Void Awakened chapter
LanguageData.Diary_AnomalyPolicy.creepJoinerSurgicalR: {0}'s abnormal condition was visibly disclosed by the completed inspection
LanguageData.Diary_AnomalyPolicy.ghoulTransformationN: {0} visibly underwent the irreversible transformation into a ghoul
